hero.headline: Govern enterprise AI agents before they reach production.
hero.subheadline: Open Enterprise AgentOps Mesh is an open-source control plane for evaluating, approving, tracing, and operating AI agents with deterministic governance boundaries.

empty_states.message: No benchmark runs yet. Run a deterministic benchmark suite to create release evidence before adding live execution.
No public feedback has been triaged yet. Add a use-case submission or architecture critique to begin the community loop.
No approval requests are pending. Create one when an agent action requires human review before sandbox execution.

boundary_banner: Live providers, live connectors, raw secrets, and production IAM remain disabled in this release.
